overrides.expect: \delta_ {\beta_ {1} \ldots \beta_ {p}} ^ {\alpha_ {1} \ldots \alpha_ {p}} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} + 1 & \text {if (\alpha_{1} ,\ldots,\alpha_{p}) is an even permutation of (\beta_{1} ,\ldots,\beta_{p})}, \\ - 1 & \text {if (\alpha_{1} ,\ldots,\alpha_{p}) is an odd permutation of (\beta_{1} ,\ldots,\beta_{p})}, \\ 0 & \text {if (i) any two of the \alpha^{\prime}s are the same}, \\ 0 & \text {if (ii) any two of the \beta^{\prime}s are the same}, \\ 0 & \text {if (iii) the \alpha^{\prime}s and \beta^{\prime}s are different sets of integers}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \delta_ {\beta_ {1} \ldots \beta_ {p}} ^ {\alpha_ {1} \ldots\alpha_{p}} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} + 1 & \text {if ($\alpha_ {1} ,\ldots,\alpha_{p}$) is an even permutation of ($\beta_ {1} ,\ldots,\beta_{p}$)}, \\ - 1 & \text {if ($\alpha_ {1} ,\ldots,\alpha_{p}$) is an odd permutation of ($\beta_ {1} ,\ldots,\beta_{p}$)}, \\ 0 & \text {if (i) any two of the $\alpha$'s are the same}, \\ 0 & \text {if (ii) any two of the $\beta$'s are the same}, \\ 0 & \text {if (iii) the $\alpha$'s and $\beta$'s are different sets of integers}. \end{array} \right.
